de.uka.ilkd.key.java.declaration

Interface TypeDeclarationContainer

  • All Superinterfaces:
    ModelElement, NonTerminalProgramElement, ProgramElement, SourceElement, SVSubstitute
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    ArrayDeclaration, ClassDeclaration, CompilationUnit, ContextStatementBlock, EnumClassDeclaration, InterfaceDeclaration, New, StatementBlock, SuperArrayDeclaration, TypeDeclaration

    public interface TypeDeclarationContainer
extends NonTerminalProgramElement
    Type declaration container. taken from COMPOST and changed to achieve an immutable structure
